executives.name: Hongqiang Zhao
executives.background: Mr. Hongqiang Zhao has served as our independent director since July 2020. Mr. Zhao serves as an executive director and the chief financial officer of Bairong Inc. (HKEX: 6608). Mr. Zhao also serves as an independent non-executive director of GDS Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: GDS; HKEX: 9698).
